allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./jest-results.json'\); d.testResults.forEach\(r=>{ if\(!r||!r.testFilePath\) return; const parts=r.testFilePath.split\('__tests__'\); const f='__tests__'+parts[1]; const pass=r.testResults.filter\(t=>t.status==='passed'\).length; const fail=r.testResults.filter\(t=>t.status==='failed'\).length; console.log\(pass+' '+\(fail?'FAIL\('+fail+'\)':'OK'\)+' '+f\); }\);")
